particulars.description: By way of legal mortgage over all that f/h property situate at and k/a station yard moor row cumbria and/or the proceeds of sale thereof. A specific equitable charge over all freehold and leasehold properties and/or the proceeds of sale thereof fixed and floating charges over undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts and the benefits of any licences.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
